creator: aesirheim@gmail.com
text:
x11/cde is marked Broken at the moment:

BROKEN: Fails to build: ld: error: ../../../exports/lib/libDtHelp.so: undefined reference to jpeg_CreateDecompress

There is a patch available that fixes building on FreeBSD 12. Diff available here: 

https://sourceforge.net/p/cdesktopenv/code/ci/2f8a2ec0663cc68e39f4c949ec1eea59f9967af3/
